ocr_findings.description: Artifact '^{}[]' appears on line 5 of OCR output, likely from decorative Lesson badge/icon element. Not actual text — cosmetic noise.
Image shows a small illustration (person with binoculars on ship) with no associated text. OCR correctly omits image, but the sidebar callout box '経営者は船長だ！' text block is captured correctly.
OCR text cuts off mid-sentence at end: 'ITパス' — page continues on next page. This is normal page-boundary truncation, not an OCR error.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 01-01 opening page with substantial body text explaining why business strategy content appears in an IT exam. OCR captures all substantive prose accurately. The '^{}[]' artifact is a recurring Mistral OCR artifact from decorated lesson-badge graphics and is cosmetic only.
